---
title: "Lucy Taylor"
role: intern
#projects: [hypomania]
image: "../images/lucy.png"
# programme: [gambling]
# listing:
#    - id: badges
#      contents: "../badges_awarded/lucy/*.jpg"
#      template: ../badges.ejs
#    - id : projects
#      contents: "../projects/*qmd"
#      type: default
#      include: 
#        people: [lucy]
#      fields: [description, title,funder]
about: 
  template: trestles
  image-width: 10em
  image-shape: round
---

Hello, my name is Lucy Taylor and I am a third-year Psychology student. I hope to become a Clinical Psychologist focusing on psychological disorders in adults such as OCD, anxiety and schizophrenia. I am also interested in the factors influencing help-seeking propensity. From my internship, I hope to use the knowledge I have gained in the classroom and learn to apply it to a lab setting. I would also like to gain more of an insight into the inner workings of lab-based research including data collection, lab engagement and networking.

<!-- ## Projects I have been involved in -->

<!-- ::: {#projects} -->
<!-- ::: -->

<!-- ## Research Training  -->

<!-- ::: {#badges} -->

<!-- ::: -->
